titles.title: I Worship You Almighty God / There Is None Like You

authors.author: Sondra Corbett
Sondra Corbett
Ich bet' dich an, Allmächtiger Gott

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I worship You, Almighty God, There is none like You. I worship You, oh Prince of Peace, That is what I long to do. I give you praise, for You are my righteousness. I worship You, Almighty God; There is none like You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is none, There is none, There is none like You.
